text: Honey — Obaa-chan's A1c came back at 8.4. Dr. Reyes wants to add a second metformin dose at dinner. Appt is Friday 2:30 in Bend, I'm driving.
ok thanks for letting me know. I'm on call Fri PM so can't come but call me after. love you, give Obaa-chan a hug from me.
will do. and good luck Saturday <3 tell Hikari Obaa-chan says go fast
ok so convoy plan: 6am out of Tumalo, Madras Country Cafe for biscuits, load-in 8:30. should be at the grounds for 9 sharp. you good?
heads up gate-in pushed to 9:30 per the addendum on the entry PDF. still 6am out works tho. meet at the 97/Tumalo park&ride?
Confirmed Fri Oct 30 10am at your place. Hikari front shoes + Sage rasps. Venmo ok.
thanks for the call sis. talk Sunday usual time?
97 park&ride works. coffee on me. you running the 2nd go right? slot 12?
yep slot 12 of 28 second go-round. warm-up arena opens 8:15. see you 6.
got Sat afternoon on-call covered. go get that buckle. radio me only if it's on fire
you're a lifesaver thank you. I'll have the truck radio on till 11 then hand off
Need the Henderson booster window locked before you leave Fri. Sign-off once the inbound date is firm.
On it — auditing the Zoetis portal + FedEx this morning. Will send a reconciliation note for your sign-off.
confirmed Jake — Fri 10/30 10am. venmo. see you then
Mido-chan! Mom says you race Saturday. Go fast and be safe. I make you mochi when you visit. <3
